overview: MediCare Hub is a mobile-first health management web app that helps patients securely track prescriptions, medical reports, medicine reminders, and follow-up appointments — all in one simple, accessible place.
features: Dashboard with today's medicines and upcoming follow-ups
Prescription management with image/PDF upload support
Medicine reminders with dose tracking (mark taken/missed)
Medical reports upload and storage (lab, imaging, test results)
Follow-up appointment scheduling with doctor details
